steps.title: Move from past to present
steps.content: The passage first gives a 2003 discovery, then states the current accumulated total of moons discovered around Jupiter. The transition must mean up to the present time.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice B introduces an example, but the sentence gives a total. Choice C restates a previous idea, which this sentence does not do. Choice D signals correction or contrast. The needed transition marks the current endpoint of discoveries. The answer is A.
